scripts.copy: xcopy E:\Programms\Serien-Ranking\src\components E:\Programms\Florian-Serien\src\components /y && xcopy E:\Programms\Serien-Ranking\src\components E:\Programms\Desiree-Serien\src\components /y && xcopy E:\Programms\Serien-Ranking\src\Styles E:\Programms\Florian-Serien\src\Styles /y && xcopy E:\Programms\Serien-Ranking\src\Styles E:\Programms\Desiree-Serien\src\Styles /y
scripts.deploy_all: cd E:\Programms\Florian-Serien && npm run build && cd E:\Programms\Desiree-Serien && npm run build
